subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1913-06-17 in Port Said
subcodes.first_line: We had crossed half the globe in the span of twelve hours when we arrived at Los Angeles on this journey. Had we returned by way of China, Japan, and India, we would have made a full trip around the world
subcodes.first_line_orig: در این سفر چون بلاس انجلز رسیدیم ١٢ ساعت ریاضی نصف کرهٴ ارض را طی نمودیم
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @spiritual transformation, @law of cause and effect, @heat and motion
